title: Beanie Boo husky — eyes back, nose tears mended
description: This husky Beanie Boo came in with torn fabric around the nose and loose eyes. We deep cleaned the plush, secured the eyes, and repaired the nose area so it is cuddly and display-ready again.
itemDetails: Ty Beanie Boo husky plush belongs to Ty's Beanie Boo line launched in 2009, recognized by oversized glitter-style eyes and named character releases. The line became a major modern collectible category with regular seasonal and retailer-exclusive drops. Materials are typically polyester plush with polyester fill and Ty's branded heart/swing tags identifying character name and birthday.
repairDetails: This Beanie Boo husky arrived with holes and tears around the nose and needed a full refresh. We deep cleaned the plush, reattached the eyes, and repaired the damaged fabric around the nose so the face holds together again.
